job_detail_fetch.title: WordPress Developer
job_detail_fetch.description:
As a WordPress Developer, you're responsible for Making Stuff Go. You will build infrastructure to create new features, improve existing code, squash bugs, and help us rapidly scale our platform.

💡 Interested in applying?

🔍 Please read/follow the next steps outlined in "How to Apply" at the bottom of this listing.

Attention to detail is one of our core values! This is your chance to stand out :)

To love this role, here’s the type of person you are:

  • You’re a self-starter who loves taking initiative and seeing things through from conception to completion. Our developers often "own" features/tasks and are responsible for scoping, development, and testing.
  • You're an excellent communicator, fluent in both verbal and written English, who makes sure nothing slips through the cracks. We believe communication is critical, and there is no such thing as overcommunication.
  • You have the curiosity and desire to learn and grow your skills.
  • You're passionate about leaving your mark on the web for all to see and are excited to work on tasks that impact millions of users.
  • You take pride in the quality and craftsmanship of your work rather than just doing it to get it done.
  • You're a team player who is comfortable working alongside and helping other developers, and you don't take critical feedback personally.
  • You're happy jumping between front-end and back-end development tasks, or tackling tasks which require both.
  • You're happy working on tasks of all sizes - from small bug fixes and enhancements to large features/rewrites.

Common responsibilities include (but are not limited to):

  • Triaging bugs and small enhancements that come into GitHub.
  • Scoping, writing, and testing new product features and addons.
  • Refactoring legacy code with a particular attention to backwards compatibility.
  • Providing feedback and peer review for other developers (Github PRs).
  • Communicating with the team and supporting your peers using chat, audio, and video.
job_detail_fetch.requirements:
• Professional experience with WordPress plugin development, architecture, and standards.
  • Advanced proficiency with PHP and MySQL, including modern PHP practices (OOP, autoloading, namespacing, traits, interfaces, etc).
  • Strong familiarity with JavaScript (vanilla JS, jQuery, ES6, etc).
  • Ability to use and extend build tools like gulp and webpack.
  • Familiarity with package managers such as Composer and NPM.
  • Experience working with third-party APIs (Eg Stripe, Drip, Zapier, etc).
  • Competent with version control through git and GitHub.
  • The ability to iterate and ship ideas quickly.
  • Exceptional troubleshooting skills.
  • Ability to keep complex ideas and features simple. (Simplicity is a core value!)
  • Previous freelance or remote work experience.
  • Personal Computer with Internet Access
  • Availability to participate in audio/video meetings between the hours 9 am - 5 pm EST.

Bonus points if you also have:

  • Advanced proficiency in JavaScript frameworks like VueJS or React.
  • Experience with e-commerce platforms or related APIs (Easy Digital Downloads, WooCommerce, Stripe, PayPal, etc).
  • Experience with DevOps or infrastructure management.
job_detail_fetch.benefits:
Working for a fast-growing bootstrapped company is a rare opportunity, one we consider a lifestyle choice rather than a job choice. Our positions are challenging, but also come with amazing advantages and fulfillment to those who earn them. Here’s what we offer.

  • Competitive Salary.
  • Term Life Insurance and Accidental Death & Dismemberment for all full-time team members during their employment.
  • Health, Dental, and Vision Insurance benefits for full-time U.S. employees.
  • Health Insurance benefits for all employees in Argentina, Brazil, Egypt, India, Indonesia, Jamaica, Kenya, Mexico, Nepal, Nigeria, Pakistan, Philippines, Poland, Romania, Serbia, Spain, and Ukraine.
  • Work from your home. We’re spread out all over the world – United States, Canada, Ukraine, India, Pakistan, Singapore, and more.
  • Flexible PTO after 90 days of employment. We encourage employees to take the time they need for a vacation, stay healthy, and spend time with friends and family.
  • Holidays (based on your location)
  • Paid Parental Leave.
  • We happily provide or reimburse software you’ll need as well as books or courses that promote continued learning.
  • We cover all costs of company travel (including our annual all-company retreat and mini-team meetups).
  • Additional Perks include AM Welcome Box for new team members, Yearly Anniversary Gifts, and Technology Stipend each work anniversary.
  • We give you the opportunity to solve challenging and meaningful problems that make a difference.
  • Ability to work with some of the best people in the business through frequent, if not daily, interactions.
  • And in case you were wondering: no politics, no b.s., and no jerks.

Location
This is a remote position - our team is spread around the globe! Our home base is in Florida, USA, so company operating hours are 9am - 5pm ET (UTC -5). While full coverage is not a requirement, you must be available during a portion of the day.

Inclusion Statement
At Awesome Motive, we strive to have the broadest possible view of diversity, going beyond visible differences to include the background, experiences, skills, and perspectives that make each person unique. Awesome Motive is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, veteran status, or any other basis protected by federal, state, or local law.

How to apply?
If all of this sounds interesting, then please submit your application!

Please clearly include the following in your cover letter:

  • Your experience with WordPress plugin development.
  • What is your favorite WordPress hook/function and why.
  • Tell us a bit about yourself and why you should be considered. Details about your experience, qualifications, personality, etc are very helpful.
  • Profile links with code samples (GitHub, GitLab, WordPress.org, etc).
  • Other profile links if available (Your website, Twitter, LinkedIn, etc).

Also note, don't forget to proofread before submitting. Check spelling, capitalization, etc. This is your chance to make your application stand out :)

We won’t be able to individually respond to all applications, but if we feel you’re a strong match, someone will be in touch shortly.

Thanks and we look forward to hearing from you!

job_detail_fetch.title: Account Manager (Czech/Slovak Speaker)
job_detail_fetch.description:
🌍 Global SaaS Scale-up | Series B
💡 Personalised 1:1 Coaching 
📍 Barcelona or Prague, Hybrid (4 days in-office)

About CloudTalk

CloudTalk is THE global AI-powered business calling platform, trusted by 30,000+ professionals at companies like Nokia, Revolut, Glovo, and Uber.

We’re building the world’s most capable AI business calling software available in 160+ countries — helping businesses have more and better calls every day. Backed by $35.3M in funding from leading investors, including KPN Ventures, Point Nine, and HenQ, we're investing in making AI native to every conversation.

We're a ~200-person team that values growth, innovation, teamwork, customer focus, and human connection. We move fast, build for the future, and care deeply about creating products — and a culture — that people genuinely love.

Why Join CloudTalk Now?

We're in an era of rapid innovation — taking our top-tier communication infrastructure to the next level by integrating cutting-edge AI. Join us as we pioneer the future of business communication and drive toward $100M ARR.

🚀Be part of one of Europe’s fastest-growing SaaS companies

🤖 Work with cutting-edge AI products in a high-growth market. From real-time call intelligence, automated summaries, and AI coaching to AI voice agents and AI receptionists that are transforming how our clients handle volume at scale

🎯 Have a front-row seat in our journey to $100M ARR

The Role

Our Account Managers are the business owners of their portfolio. This is a quota-carrying role where you will own Customer Retention and Portfolio Expansion. You will be a trusted strategic partner to your clients, accountable for their success metrics and the health of your book of business.

This is not a reactive support role. We need someone who runs their portfolio like a business: setting health benchmarks, building save plays before risk surfaces, and consistently translating CloudTalk's capabilities into measurable ROI for clients.

What You Will Do

Be the Strategic Business Partner

Run regular Executive Business Reviews that tie CloudTalk performance directly to your clients' KPIs. Position yourself as a trusted advisor — not just a vendor contact — and build durable relationships with decision makers and executive stakeholders.

Own Retention & Expansion

Lead the full renewal cycle across your portfolio — forecast risk, build proactive save strategies, and consistently hit retention targets quarter over quarter. Churn on your accounts should never come as a surprise.

Identify and close organic growth opportunities within your portfolio — whether that's increased seat count, platform adoption, or premium add-ons. You should know your accounts well enough to see expansion plays before clients do.

Own Portfolio Health

Build and maintain customer health frameworks for your book of business. Define the leading indicators that matter, track them in HubSpot and your analytics stack, and intervene early — before issues become escalations.

Act as the Internal Advocate

Be the voice of your clients inside CloudTalk. Partner closely with Product, Support, and Customer Engineering to resolve issues, surface feedback, and influence the roadmap — while confidently representing CloudTalk's direction back to your accounts.

What Makes You a Great Fit

We're looking for experienced Account Managers or Customer Success Managers who've owned meaningful books of business in B2B SaaS — not just managed relationships, but driven commercial outcomes.

  • 2+ years in Account Management or Customer Success in B2B SaaS, with a demonstrable track record of hitting retention and expansion targets
  • Proven ownership of a book of business independently — you've managed renewals, run save plays, and grown accounts without heavy oversight
  • Experience owning customer health metrics: you've built or worked within health score frameworks and used leading indicators to drive proactive action
  • Comfortable running Executive Business Reviews and navigating multi-stakeholder accounts up to C-suite
  • Highly commercial mindset — you think like a revenue owner, not just a relationship manager
  • Data-driven: comfortable in Excel/Sheets, BI dashboards, and CRM reporting to manage your portfolio analytically
  • Technical aptitude — you enjoy learning SaaS products deeply and can guide customers to maximise platform value
  • Familiarity with CS/AM tooling: HubSpot, Gainsight, Planhat, or similar
  • Business fluency in English and Czech/Slovak

Why you will love to be a CloudTalker:

Growth:
💡 1-1 Coaching sessions with our resident communications advisor
📚 Leaders Academy & Learning and Development Budget

Flexibility:

🏖 Unlimited Paid Time Off
🎗️ Volunteering Days
💻 MacBook for work 

Well-being:
🏖Recharge Fridays once per quarter
🏋🏼‍♀️Fitness Allowance

Connectedness:
💲 Referral bonuses
👥 Virtual & physical team buildings
👕 Company merchandise

Apply now and be part of our journey to $100M ARR!

By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Cloudtalk will process your personal data based on Cloudtalk’s legitimate interest in finding the most suitable candidate and a pre-contractual relationship with you. For more information on how Cloudtalk processes your personal data, please refer to our Privacy Notice.

job_detail_fetch.title: Customer Support Representative - 12h Shift (Manila, Philippines)
job_detail_fetch.description:
Please submit your CV in English.

🌍 Global SaaS Company | $28M Series B Investment
🚀 Structured mentorship & upskilling
📍 Remotely from Manila, Philippines
💰 Compensation consists of base salary (±600EUR) and a monthly bonus (up to 20%; 80/20 split) based on productivity and CSAT

💻 Working Hours:
Working time is divided unequally into short and long weeks as follows:

  • Long weeks: Mon, Tu, Fri, Sat, Sun, working time 9pm-9:30am CET / 4am-4:30pm PST
  • Short weeks: Wed & Thu, working time 9pm-9:30am CET / 4am-4:30pm PST

In a month, you will have 2 long and 2 short weeks.

The Challenge Ahead

  • As part of the Customer Support L1 team, you’ll be the person customers rely on when something isn’t working as expected. Your job is to investigate, understand the root cause, and guide customers clearly and confidently.
  • We’re looking for people who love to figure things out - people who notice patterns, enjoy breaking problems into pieces, and can explain technical issues in a simple way.
  • This role is perfect for someone who has always been a bit geeky:
    • You can handle basic computer troubleshooting
    • You’re comfortable navigating system settings
    • You enjoy understanding how things work
    • You aren’t afraid to dig into logs, connection tests, or edge cases
  • No previous VOIP experience is required — we'll teach you everything. What matters most is logic, curiosity, and problem-solving.

What You’ll Do

  • Provide top-tier technical support via chat and email
  • Investigate call flows, connectivity problems, audio quality issues, device setups, and configuration errors
  • Diagnose VOIP-related problems (latency, jitter, firewalls, ISP behaviours, etc.)
  • Inspect logs, replicate issues, and gather data for deeper analysis
  • Handle a high volume of conversations with accuracy and focus
  • Document troubleshooting steps and contribute to our knowledge base
  • Represent CloudTalk with empathy, clear communication, and ownership



Who We’re Looking For

🧠 A Logical Thinker: You enjoy solving puzzles, identifying root causes, and structuring your thoughts clearly.

🛠 Tech-Savvy & Curious: You’re not afraid of system settings, connection tests, or exploring how features work. You don’t need to be an engineer - but you should be someone who can dig in.

⚡ Problem-Solver With Ownership: You measure success by problems solved, not ticket volume. You are proactive, responsible, and want to get things right.

💬 Strong Communicator: Clear English (C1). Spanish is a plus.

🤝 Team Player Who Shares Knowledge: We appreciate people who help others learn - curiosity and collaboration are part of our culture.

About CloudTalk

CloudTalk is THE global AI-powered business calling platform, trusted by 30,000+ professionals at companies like Nokia, Revolut, Glovo, and Uber.

We’re building the world’s most capable AI business calling software available in 160+ countries — helping businesses have more and better calls every day. Backed by $35.3M in funding from leading investors, including KPN Ventures, Point Nine, and HenQ, we're investing in making AI native to every conversation.

We're a ~200-person team that values growth, innovation, teamwork, customer focus, and human connection. We move fast, build for the future, and care deeply about creating products — and a culture — that people genuinely love.

Why Join CloudTalk

🤖 Be Part of a Global Tech Product: Support a modern cloud communication platform used by 4,000+ sales & support teams - from fast-growing scale-ups to enterprise players.

💡 Meaningful Technical Work: Learn real VOIP fundamentals, call routing, number provisioning, latency issues, connectivity troubleshooting, system behaviours and platform logic.

🚀 Growth Paths Support: This role is intentionally built as a stepping stone for future technical careers at CloudTalk:

  • Shift Lead, QA Lead
  • Product: L2 Engineer, Technical Consultant, Integration Specialist
  • Customer Success: Customer Success Manager

Hiring Process

1. Quick Video Interview
2. Role Deep Dive: Meet your future colleagues
3. Assignment: Have a look into our platform
4. Culture Bar Raiser Call – Explore your potential to raise the bar in adaptability, ownership, and continuous improvement
🎯 Offer!

Benefits Provided

Growth:

💡 1-1 Coaching sessions with our resident communications advisor
📚 Learning and Development Budget

Flexibility:

🏖 Unlimited Paid Time Off
🎗️ Volunteering Days
💻 MacBook for work

job_detail_fetch.title: Deal Desk Manager
job_detail_fetch.description:
🌍 Global SaaS Scale-up | $28M Series B Investment
📍 Barcelona | Hybrid, 4 days in-office (Aticco Urquinaona, Rda. de Sant Pere, 52, Eixample, 08010)

About CloudTalk

CloudTalk is THE global AI-powered business calling platform, trusted by 30,000+ professionals at companies like Nokia, Revolut, Glovo, and Uber.

We’re building the world’s most capable AI business calling software available in 160+ countries — helping businesses have more and better calls every day. Backed by $35.3M in funding from leading investors, including KPN Ventures, Point Nine, and HenQ, we're investing in making AI native to every conversation.

We're a ~200-person team that values growth, innovation, teamwork, customer focus, and human connection. We move fast, build for the future, and care deeply about creating products — and a culture — that people genuinely love.

A challenge ahead:

CloudTalk’s Finance Team is growing, and we’re looking for a Deal Desk Manager to architect and own the deal-execution process.

This is a founding role within the function. We need a senior professional who has the experience to build the Deal Desk from scratch and the "roll-up-your-sleeves" attitude to manage the day-to-day operations. You will be the critical bridge between Sales, RevOps, and Finance, ensuring our growth is backed by operational excellence and clean data.

  • Build the Blueprint – You will define the workflows, approval matrices, and "rules of engagement" for how deals are structured and closed.
  • Guard Revenue Integrity – You’ll ensure that every contract signed is commercially sound, properly documented, and ready for seamless billing.
  • Drive System Order – You will be the primary person responsible for ensuring our CRM and Billing data is 100% accurate, eliminating the "fix it later" culture.

What you’ll work on:

  • Function Architecture: Design and implement the end-to-end Deal Desk framework, including the "Quote-to-Cash" workflow and deal approval levels.
  • Billing Ownership: Take a hands-on lead in setting up billing for complex or non-standard deals, ensuring 100% accuracy between the signed contract and our financial systems.
  • Billing System Optimization: Proactively identify billing bottlenecks and operational inefficiencies; lead the design and implementation of system and process improvements to ensure a scalable, automated, and error-free billing engine.
  • Deal Governance: Act as the final "Quality Gate" for all deals. For smaller deals, you will review and approve; for larger deals, you will actively help structure them.
  • Contracting & Pricing: Review and approve all amendments to pricing and contract terms, ensuring they align with CloudTalk’s financial guidelines and legal requirements.
  • System Integrity: Clean up and maintain the "source of truth" in our systems. You will ensure that errors are caught and corrected before a deal is closed, not after.
  • Sales Enablement: Educate the Sales team on deal structuring best practices to improve the quality of submissions and reduce friction during the closing process.
  • Cross-functional Liaison: Work closely with Finance (for billing), RevOps (for systems), and Sales (for velocity) to resolve roadblocks.

What we are looking for:

  • The "Builder" Experience: 5+ years of experience in Deal Desk or Sales Operations. We value candidates who have helped a company transition from "manual/messy" to "structured/scalable."
  • Operational Rigor: You have a low tolerance for "messy" data. You are someone who enjoys bringing order to chaos and making sure every field in the CRM is exactly where it should be.
  • SaaS Expertise: Deep understanding of SaaS commercial terms, subscription billing models, and common pitfalls in software contracting.
  • Assertive Partnering: You can hold your ground with Sales teams to ensure quality, while still being a "problem solver" who helps them get deals across the finish line.
  • Technical Proficiency: Strong experience with CRM systems and an understanding of how they talk to billing/accounting software.
  • Proactive Personality: You don’t wait for a manual; you write it. You are eager to improve our reporting and planning maturity by ensuring the data going in is perfect. 

Why you will love to be a CloudTalker:

Growth:
💡 1-1 Coaching sessions with our resident communications advisor
📚 Leaders Academy & Learning and Development Budget

Flexibility:
🏖 Unlimited Paid Time Off
🎗️ Volunteering Days
⏳ Flexible working hours
🤩 Home office budget
💻 MacBook for work 

Well-being:
🏖Recharge Fridays once per quarter
🏋🏼‍♀️ Fitness Allowance

Connectedness:
💲 Referral bonuses
👥 Virtual & physical team buildings
👕 Company merchandise

1. Interview with our Talent Acquisition Team
2. Interview with our Finance Leader
3. Interview with RevOps and Sales Leader
4. Culture Bar Raiser Call and Offer

job_detail_fetch.title: Director of Product
job_detail_fetch.description:
🌍 Global SaaS | $28M Series B Investment
📍 Remote in Europe

The Mission

As the Director of Product, you will lead the product organization to move with conviction, speed, and evidence. You are responsible for leading a team of Product Managers, Designers and Product Operations to ensure we are solving high-impact problems and building the leanest, most impactful solutions for our customers and the business.

You will act as the primary strategic force for the executive team, front-running strategy and managing stakeholder expectations, owning the tactical translation of strategy into a coherent, high-velocity roadmap, so that the roadmap remains proactive, data-driven, and aligned with our commercial goals. Your goal is to be a "Player-Coach" who deep-dives into the domain with PMs to ensure excellent execution habits. You are the final gatekeeper who resolves blockers and scope disputes before they ever reach the CEO or CPTO, which will provide you and the teams with a level of autonomy in which to thrive.

You drive efficiency through an AI-First approach, while embracing SVPG style experimentation and pragmatic execution, and inject these principles into your teams. This allows you to closely align with the Director of Engineering and make Dual Track Agile a standard across the organization.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Elevating Product Discovery & Conviction

  • Advancing Empowered Squads: You will work to continually increase the level of empowerment within our squads. Moving beyond execution, you coach PMs to take deeper ownership of business outcomes, ensuring they are positioned to solve complex problems rather than just deliver features.
  • Continuous Discovery: You own the standard for modern discovery. You ensure squads are in constant contact with users to (in)validate hypotheses before significant engineering resources are committed.
  • Bias to Action with Knowledge: You move with high urgency but high conviction. Decisions must be rooted in user insights and market data, ensuring we are always "building the right thing."

2. The Product-Engineering Partnership (Dual-Track Agile)

  • Strategic Duo: You work in a tight, peer-level partnership with the Director of Engineering to lead the "R&D engine." Together, you are responsible for the total health, culture, and output of the R&D organization.
  • Discovery vs. Delivery Alignment: While you own the Discovery Track (validating value and usability), you collaborate daily with the Director of Engineering, who owns the Delivery Track (feasibility, scalability, and execution). You ensure these two tracks are synchronized and never siloed.
  • Resource & Trade-off Management: You partner with Engineering leadership to manage capacity. You lead the difficult conversations regarding trade-offs between new feature discovery, technical debt, and maintenance, ensuring the business is always focused on the highest ROI activities.

3. Executive Communication & Stakeholder Management

  • The "Final Answer": You are the primary gatekeeper for the product roadmap. You provide clear, definitive "Yes/No" decisions to executive stakeholders underpinned with knowledge of our customers and the necessary trade-offs.
  • Vacuum Prevention: You identify misalignments early and resolve them across all swimlanes of the business. 
  • Commercial Realism: You translate high-level business goals (Retention, Revenue, Strategic Growth) into actionable priorities while aligning with the company’s core Key Results and Business Objectives.

4. Operational Excellence & People Leadership

  • Product Operations Mastery: You view Product Ops as a strategic lever. You standardize discovery documentation and research databases across the organization to create a transparent, low-friction environment.
  • Outcome Accountability: You manage the Product Scorecard and Rolling Roadmap. These must be high-integrity, automated "Sources of Truth" providing executive-level visibility.
  • Radical Candor: You practice direct challenge combined with personal care. You are responsible for raising the "Product IQ" of your team—coaching PMs to think like owners and act with strategic independence.

5. Product Advocacy & Representation

  • Product Voice to the Company: Serve as the primary representative of the Product organization in company-wide meetings (All Hands, Town Halls). You must be able to translate complex technical roadmaps into compelling narratives that inspire and align the entire business.
  • Evangelizing the Vision: Actively advocate for the "Why" behind our product strategy. You ensure that Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success clearly understand our product direction, value propositions, and upcoming releases.
  • Presentation Excellence: You possess elite presentation skills, utilizing the Pyramid Principle to deliver high-impact, succinct, and visually clear updates to both internal and external audiences.

6. Aggressive Scope Management & Lean Execution

  • The "Slicer": You coach PMs to avoid "heavyweight" features. You have a relentless focus on building the leanest possible MVP, MSP, CMF, ILS solutions based on the need or pain. If a solution is over-scoped, you are the one who cuts it back to the core value.
  • Pushback & Scrappiness: You teach PMs to find their “appetite” for investment into a solution and how to find "cheaper" ways to validate hypotheses. You empower them to push back on high-effort requests by proposing creative, lower-cost alternatives.
  • Deep-Dive Problem Solving: You don’t stay at the surface. You sit with PMs to help them deeply understand core user problems to avoid building "to cover all bases" and relentlessly focus on solving the actual customer pain.

The Ideal Profile:

  • The High-Agency Leader: You don't wait for permission; you identify gaps and fill them. You have a natural "bias to action" but are always grounded in data.
  • The SVPG & Cagan Practitioner: You live and breathe modern product principles and know how to coach others to do the same.
  • The Elite Communicator: You are a master of the Pyramid Principle. You can command a room, whether it’s a 3rd-person Exec meeting or a 200-person All Hands.
  • The Systems Thinker: You look at the "R&D Engine" as a whole and work with your Engineering counterpart to optimize for both speed and quality.
  • Operational Source of Truth: The Scorecard and Roadmap are automated and accurate, serving as the definitive guide for the executive team and the business.

Success Metrics (First 90 Days):

  • R&D Sync: Established a seamless rhythm with the Director of Engineering; joint ownership of delivery velocity and discovery outcomes.
  • Strategic Visibility: The "Rolling Roadmap" and "Scorecard" are live, automated, and being used by the Executive team without manual intervention.
  • Empowerment Baseline: Documented "Discovery to Delivery" workflows for all 6 squads with clear KPIs for hypothesis validation.
  • Stakeholder Trust: A measurable reduction in "Roadmap bypass" incidents; stakeholders rely on your "Final Answer."

job_detail_fetch.title: Forward Deployed Engineer
job_detail_fetch.description:
🌍 Global SaaS | $28M Series B Investment
📍 Barcelona, Spain - on site

The Mission

CloudTalk is redefining business telephony with our next-generation AI Voice Agent, CeTe. But selling the future of voice AI is only half the battle; making it work flawlessly in messy, real-world customer environments is where we win.

As our first Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE), you won't be building sandbox toys. You will deploy production-ready AI agents that handle thousands of real conversations across 160+ countries and 60+ languages. You will own the technical lifecycle- from the pre-sales prototype that wins the deal, to the deep post-sales integrations that turn our global customers into AI-first companies.

Why This Role Is a Career Accelerator :

  • Global Scale: Work directly with the world’s most innovative companies to transform their revenue operations using CloudTalk's vast telephony infrastructure.
  • Bleeding-Edge Tech: Master the intersection of advanced LLMs, real-time voice synthesis, and complex CRM architectures.
  • High-Impact Visibility: Sitting at the intersection of AI and GTM, your successful deployments will directly unlock MRR (Monthly Recurring Revenue) and drive company-wide growth.

What You'll Do:

    • End-to-End Implementation: Partner with Account Executives to build working AI prototypes that close deals, then design, build, and deploy the deep technical integrations (APIs, webhooks, Make/n8n) required to connect the AIVA to customer CRMs and helpdesks in production.
    • AI Configuration & Tuning: Configure and continuously optimize the AI Agent by tuning prompts, defining intents and actions, building edge-case guardrails, and optimizing latency metrics to ensure high-quality, natural conversations with zero delay and no hallucination.
    • Drive Pipeline & MRR: Partner directly with AEs, Channel Managers and CSMs to own top-line adoption metrics (e.g., AIVA MRR, AIVA Usage). You will slash time-to-first-value and actively help generate pipeline and upsells within existing accounts.
    • The Product Feedback Loop: Take the messy edge cases you solve in the field and work with our core Engineering team to turn your custom "hacks" into scalable, native product features.
    • Peer-to-Peer Guidance: The FDE is a deeply technical builder who will fully set up their own API integrations and automations. They will only reach out to the Tech Consulting team for high-level advice, system architecture guidance, or core telephony escalations; treating TCs as respected peers, not as an implementation helpdesk.

What You Bring (Experience & Skills):

    • Experience: 3+ years in a hybrid technical/commercial role (e.g., Solutions Engineering, Technical Implementation, or ex-founder).
    • Integration Mastery: Deep expertise wiring up systems using REST APIs, Webhooks, JSON, and low-code orchestrators (Make, n8n, Zapier).
    • CRM Ecosystems: Hands-on experience mapping custom data and building workflows in platforms like HubSpot and Salesforce.
    • Light Scripting: Ability to write quick Python or JavaScript snippets to transform data payloads when low-code tools hit their limits.
    • Practical AI Chops: Proven experience building workflows with LLMs, including prompt tuning, setting context windows, and building guardrails against hallucinations.
    • Commercial Drive: High ownership and the communication skills to translate complex technical blockers to a non-technical VP of Sales or an irate customer.

KPIs:

  • POC-to-Production Conversion Rate: The percentage of custom pre-sales AI prototypes you build that successfully convert into closed-won, fully signed and deployed contracts.
  • Time-to-First-Value (TTFV): The total number of days from contract signature to the AI Voice Agent running live in production and successfully handling its first 1,000 billable AI minutes.
  • AIVA Minutes & AI Revenue: The month-over-month growth of actual AI voice consumption and the resulting expansion MRR generated by unlocking new automated workflows within your deployed accounts.

What Is Out of Scope For This Role:

❌ Training Core AI Models: You are not an AI Researcher or Data Scientist.

❌ Running QBRs & Chasing Renewals: You are a builder, not a traditional CSM. While your technical work directly drives MRR, you won't spend your days building slide decks for QBRs or haggling over license renewals.

❌ Throwing Demos Over the Fence: You aren't a traditional Pre-Sales Engineer who builds a flashy sandbox, gets the signature, and walks away. You own the messy reality of making your POC actually work in production.

❌ Handling commercials, pricing, or contract negotiations.

❌ Acting as a pure software engineer.

job_detail_fetch.title: CISO / Head of IT Security - Fulltime Hybrid
job_detail_fetch.description:
About Us

Ikerian AG (formerly RetinAI Medical) is a fast-growing medical device software company headquartered in Bern, Switzerland. Our mission is to enable the right decisions sooner in healthcare, through transformative AI & data management solutions for disease screening and monitoring. Join our diverse team of entrepreneurs, developers, researchers, and commercial experts who are collectively shaping the future of healthcare.

The Role

We are seeking a CISO / Head of IT Security to lead our security strategy and internal IT operations. This role is pivotal in safeguarding our digital assets and ensuring the highest standards of data privacy within the medical device software landscape. You will bridge the gap between technical security measures and the strategic needs of our growing global team.

Key Responsibilities

  • Define and implement the company-wide information security strategy and roadmap.
  • Oversee IT infrastructure, ensuring scalability, reliability, and security across all systems.
  • Lead compliance efforts for relevant standards such as ISO 27001, SOC2, HIPAA, and GDPR.
  • Manage risk assessments, vulnerability testing, and incident response protocols.
  • Supervise the procurement and management of hardware/software for a distributed workforce.
  • Foster a culture of security awareness through continuous training and policy development.
job_detail_fetch.requirements:
• 8 years of experience in a similar position (Finance sector start search)
  • Demonstrated entrepreneurial and collaborative mindset.
  • University degree in Computer Science, Information Security, or related field; professional certifications (CISSP, CISM) preferred.
  • Significant experience in information security and IT leadership, ideally within the healthcare or finance industry.
  • Expertise in cloud security architecture (AWS) and modern infrastructure tools.
  • Proven ability to manage complex IT projects and data privacy initiatives.
  • Strong leadership, stakeholder management, and communication skills.
job_detail_fetch.benefits:
• A chance to be part of an exceptional team driving innovation in healthcare.
  • A competitive salary in a supportive work environment that fosters work-life balance.
  • Opportunities for professional growth and development in an international setting.

job_detail_fetch.title: Client Executive (UK) Hybrid - Full Time
job_detail_fetch.description:
Ikerian AG (formerly RetinAI Medical) is a fast-growing medical device software company headquartered in Bern, Switzerland. Our mission is to enable the right decisions sooner in healthcare, through transformative AI & data management solutions for disease screening and monitoring. Join our diverse team of entrepreneurs, developers, researchers, and commercial experts who are collectively shaping the future of healthcare.

We are looking for a Business Developer to join our team, focused on the Pharma Segment. As a Business Developer you’ll identify new business opportunities in order to generate revenue, improve profitability and help the business grow. Your work will involve careful strategic planning and positioning in the appropriate markets, enhancing the operation of the business and our positioning in the market. The role, reporting to VP Business Development, will be part of a growing team

We are looking for Business Developers with a track record of consultative sales with Ophthalmology Pharma, Biotech , Real World Evidence and / or Clinical Research Organizations (CROs). You will be an independent thinker, a self starter comfortable with ambiguity and a results oriented problem solver. 

This role is pivotal in scaling our business development efforts. 

Responsibilities:

    • Have a good understanding of the RetinAI / Ikerain current and evolving portfolio of products and services and be able to advise others about them
    • Research and identify targets in the segments we are interested in (Pharma, Biotech and CROs focused on eye care)
    • Identify and seek out appropriate contacts in target organizations, leveraging publicly available sources and personal networks 
    • Generate leads and cold call prospective customers 
    • Meet with prospects and customers face to face or over the phone
    • Develop compelling pitches based on analysis of the organization and potential customer needs
    • Foster and develop relationships with prospects and customers
    • Understand the needs of your potential customers and be able to respond effectively with a plan of how to meet these
    • Think strategically - seeing the bigger picture and setting aims and objectives in order to develop and improve the business, and identify new opportunities in target markets and adjacent segments 
    • Work strategically - carrying out necessary planning in order to implement changes, for example working closely with Customer Success, Research, Marketing,Product and Operational colleagues
    • Draw up client contracts working with relevant internal teams (operations and legal)
    • Support the onboarding of new customers, working closely with Customer Success and members of the broader team to ensure the successful start to the project and transition of the relationship to account management
    • Manage and grow accounts from project to project
job_detail_fetch.requirements:
• Demonstrated entrepreneurial and collaborative mindset
  • Bachelor’s degree ideally in life sciences, computer science or related field, PhD/ MBA a plus
  • 5+ years of experience in business development management consulting or other customer-facing role, experience of scale - up environments a plus 
  • Proven track record of consultative sales with Ophthalmology Pharma, Biotech, MedTech and / or Clinical Research Organizations (CROs)
  • Tech savvy ideally with experience in digital health or health IT 
  • Experience working with cross functional teams (sales, marketing, development)
  • Experience working with complex, multi-divisional, multi-geographical customers; experience in healthcare environments (i.e. clinics and hospitals) a plus
  • Strong interpersonal skills with impressive executive presence and communication abilities
  • Tenacity and drive to seek new business and meet or exceed targets
  • Technical aptitude and ability to learn 
  • Ability to create structure in ambiguous situations to design and implement effective processes 
  • A strong drive for action and a passion for technology and customer success

Skills 

  • Ability to think strategically
  • Negotiating skills
  • Ability to analyze sales figures and write reports
  • Flexible approach to work with the ability to adapt to a fast-paced, ever-changing environment
  • Initiative taking and confidence to start things from scratch
  • Project management and organizational skills
  • Team Working skills and a collaborative approach to work
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
  • Experience with Customer Relationship Management software such as Hubspot
job_detail_fetch.benefits:
• A chance to be part of an exceptional team driving innovation in healthcare.
    • A competitive salary in a supportive work environment that fosters work-life balance.
    • Opportunities for professional growth and development in an international setting.
    • A culture of collaboration and inclusion, which is fundamental to our ethos.
    • Occasional travel to our HQ in Switzerland, immersing you in our core operations and company culture.

job_detail_fetch.title: Cloud Engineer (AWS) Full time - Remote EU
job_detail_fetch.description:
About Us

Ikerian AG (formerly RetinAI Medical) is a fast-growing medical device software company headquartered in Bern, Switzerland. Our mission is to enable the right decisions sooner in healthcare, through transformative AI & data management solutions for disease screening and monitoring. Join our diverse team of entrepreneurs, developers, researchers, and commercial experts who are collectively shaping the future of healthcare.

Job Description

We are looking for a Cloud Engineer to join our team, where you will play a critical role in optimizing our cloud infrastructure to meet our customers’ needs. This position is pivotal to our mission of providing a seamless, secure, and scalable experience on our platform

Key Responsibilities

  • Enhance and maintain highly available, secure, and scalable AWS cloud environments and services.
  • Manage and prioritize tasks in the cloud infrastructure backlog to address immediate needs and plan long-term improvements.
  • Set up infrastructure monitoring and observability solutions, proactively addressing availability, performance or security issues.
  • Learn the current infrastructure and take ownership of day to day cloud operational tasks and activities.
  • Assess new technologies, systems, and services for production readiness, ensuring seamless and stable integration.
  • Prepare and maintain documentation on cloud processes, procedures, and architectures to ensure clear understanding and team-wide knowledge.
  • Apply AWS Well-Architected Framework principles to evaluate and optimize our current infrastructure.
  • Contribute in out of office hour cloud deployments once or twice a month
  • Conduct POCs (proof of concepts) on new AWS services, third-party tools, and technologies to drive continuous improvement in our infrastructure.
job_detail_fetch.requirements:
• A demonstrated entrepreneurial and collaborative mindset with a proactive approach to problem-solving.
  • A university degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
  • 3-5 years of hands-on experience with AWS cloud services in a professional setting.
  • Proficiency with core AWS services, including IAM, S3, KMS, RDS, VPC, ECS, EC2, and more.
  • Experience working with multi-account and multi-region AWS production environment setups and using IaaC to manage them.
  • Strong hands-on experience with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools, preferably Terraform.
  • Scripting experience with one or more languages, such as Python, Bash, or Node.js.
  • Good knowledge of cloud security principles and services, such as AWS WAF, GuardDuty, Config and CloudTrail.
  • Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and tools preferably GitLab
  • Experience with software version control and Git.
  • Strong understanding of cloud networking concepts, including VPC, VPC Peering, Subnets, and Load Balancing.
  • Familiarity with monitoring and observability tools for cloud environments, such as Grafana, Prometheus, OpenSearch, and the ELK stack.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with a proactive approach to challenges.
  • A genuine interest in staying updated with new AWS services and features, integrating advancements into the cloud environment.
  • Ability to work well in a flexible, startup environment, taking initiative to establish new processes when necessary.
  • Excellent verbal and written English communication skills.
  • Good listening skills.
  • Familiarity with industry best practices in cloud architecture principles.
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team setting.
  • Availability to work during Central European Time (CET) business hours.
job_detail_fetch.benefits:
What We Offer

  • A chance to be part of an exceptional team driving innovation in healthcare.
  • A competitive salary in a supportive work environment that fosters work-life balance.
  • Opportunities for professional growth and development in an international setting.
  • A culture of collaboration and inclusion, which is fundamental to our ethos.
  • Occasional travel to our HQ in Switzerland, immersing you in our core operations and company culture.

job_detail_fetch.title: Medical Writer / Clinical Specialist
job_detail_fetch.description:
About Us

Ikerian AG (formerly RetinAI Medical) is a fast-growing medical device software company headquartered in Bern, Switzerland. Our mission is to enable the right decisions sooner in healthcare, through transformative AI & data management solutions for disease screening and monitoring. Join our diverse team of entrepreneurs, developers, researchers, and commercial experts who are collectively shaping the future of healthcare.

Job Description

We are looking for a Medical Writer / Clinical Specialist who will collaborate with internal and external stakeholders to prepare clinical study deliverables and clinical documents supporting submissions to regulatory agencies for Software as Medical Devices, including AI-based products. This includes but is not limited to clinical study protocols and reports, investigator brochures, informed consent documents, risk/benefit analysis, PMS/PMCF plan, CEP/CER, Literature review.

Key Responsibilities

  • SOP and Process Development: collaborate in writing and maintaining Standard Operating Procedures to ensure organizational alignment with global regulatory standards.
  • Technical Documentation: draft and refine Instructions for Use (IFU) and User Manuals to ensure complex AI-based software functionalities are accessible and clear for clinical end-users.
  • Clinical Investigation deliverables: prepare critical clinical investigation documents, including Clinical Investigation Plans (CIP), Clinical Investigation Reports (CIR), and Informed Consent Forms (ICF).
  • Clinical Evaluation deliverables: prepare Clinical Evaluation Plans (CEP) and Clinical Evaluation Reports (CER), including conducting systematic literature reviews to substantiate product safety and performance.
  • Post-Market Lifecycle Management: collaborate in the preparation of Post-Market Surveillance (PMS) and Post-Market Clinical Follow-up (PMCF) plans and reports, and Periodic Safety Update Reports (PSUR) to maintain regulatory compliance.
  • Scientific Communication: Support the company’s clinical evidence strategy by drafting high-quality scientific publications, white papers, and abstracts for international conferences and peer-reviewed journals.
  • FDA clinical study design Support
job_detail_fetch.requirements:
• University degree in Biomedical Engineering, Pharmacy, or similar.
  • Minimum of 5 years relevant work experience, thereof 2 to 3 years of experience in a medical device company and a good understanding of Regulation (EU) 2017/745 (EU MDR), ISO 14155 standard requirements, ICH E6 (R3) Guideline for good clinical practice (GCP) and 21 CFR Part 812, as well as MEDDEV 2.7.1/rev4 and MDCG guidelines related to clinical evaluation and post-market surveillance
  • Previous experience with FDA clinical study design support (i.e FDA 510k and/or FDA Denovo pathway)
  • Proven project management skills
  • Strong communicator with proven ability to manage and communicate with internal and external stakeholders
  • High level of interpersonal skills
  • Self-starter with a high degree of autonomy
  • Experience in the Ophthalmology field is a plus
  • Experience with AI in medicine is a plus
  • Fluency in English
  • Skilled in the use of Microsoft Office and/or Google G-suite applications (Word, Excel, PowerPoint and / or Docs, Sheets, Slides).
  • Willingness to travel occasionally (up to 4 events per year).
job_detail_fetch.benefits:
What We Offer

  • A chance to be part of an exceptional team driving innovation in healthcare.
  • A competitive salary in a supportive work environment that fosters work-life balance.
  • Opportunities for professional growth and development in an international setting.
  • A culture of collaboration and inclusion, which is fundamental to our ethos.
  • Occasional travel to our HQ in Switzerland, immersing you in our core operations and company culture.

job_detail_fetch.description:
About Us

Our mission is to enable the right decisions sooner in healthcare, through transformative AI & data management solutions for disease screening and monitoring. Job Description

We are looking for a Rust Engineer with a passion for data interoperability to join our team. The ideal candidate will be a proficient and innovative problem-solver with a strong background in Rust and a deep understanding of data standards. You will be responsible for building robust, scalable and efficient systems that handle complex data, ensuring seamless integration and high performance.

Key Responsibilities

  • Write clean, maintainable, testable, and efficient code using the Rust programming language.
  • Collaborate and foster a culture of knowledge sharing and teamwork to build high-quality software.
  • Assist in establishing best practices for development, testing, and deployment.
  • Mentor junior team members, helping them grow their skills and contribute effectively.
  • Design and build scalable solutions leveraging RESTful APIs and web services.
job_detail_fetch.requirements:
• A Master’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Vision, or other relevant subject, or equivalent work or open-source experience.
  • 1 - 2 years demonstrable experience with Rust AND 5 years experience with data interoperability / image processing. 
  • Proficient in the Rust programming language in a production environment.
  • Familiarity with medical data interoperability standards, such as DICOM or FHIR.
  • Good foundation of image processing, image compression, and data serialization concepts.
  • Experience with version control systems, such as Git.
  • Strong problem-solving skills and a keen attention to detail.
  • Solid debugging and testing skills.
  • Excellent English language communication skills, both verbal and written.
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
  • Demonstrated entrepreneurial and collaborative mindset.
  • Available to work during Central European Time (CET) business hours.

Desirable Skills (optional)

  • Experience in Python.
  • Knowledge of web frameworks like Axum and web APIs (e.g., REST, RESTful, GraphQL).
  • Understanding of fundamental networking concepts, such as TCP/IP, TLS encryption, and DNS.
  • Exposure to computer vision techniques (traditional or machine-learning).

job_detail_fetch.title: Strategic Initiatives Associate - FullTime - Bern
job_detail_fetch.description:
About Us

Ikerian AG (formerly RetinAI Medical) is a fast-growing medical device software company headquartered in Bern, Switzerland. Our mission is to enable the right decisions sooner in healthcare, through transformative AI & data management solutions for disease screening and monitoring. Join our diverse team of entrepreneurs, developers, researchers, and commercial experts who are collectively shaping the future of healthcare.

Job Description

As our Strategic Initiatives Associate, you will support the CEO in advancing high-priority strategic projects across the company. The role focuses on translating defined ideas into structured analyses, execution plans, and coordinated actions. 

You will validate assumptions, prepare business insights, support partnership discussions, and ensure that initiatives progress in a disciplined and measurable way. 

This role is analytical, hands-on, and cross-functional. While you will not define company strategy, you will be instrumental in shaping and advancing CEO-sponsored initiatives.

Key Responsibilities

  • Support the CEO in translating ideas into structured project plans with defined objectives and milestones, breaking them down into actionable steps and tracking deliverables, timelines, and dependencies.
  • Conduct market research and competitor analysis, identifying assumptions and designing validation steps.
  • Support preparation of business cases, including basic financial modeling and opportunity sizing.
  • Conduct stakeholder interviews (customers, partners, internal teams), gathering and synthesizing insights to inform decision-making.
  • Identify potential partners and collaborators, preparing briefing materials for partnership discussions, and support coordinating pilot projects and external collaborations.
  • Work closely with Product, R&D, Regulatory, Commercial, and Finance teams to gather inputs, ensure internal alignment, and move initiatives forward.
  • Track learning and iteration across initiatives.
  • Prepare executive-ready summary reports and recommendation documents for internal review meetings.
job_detail_fetch.requirements:
• 2–5 years of experience in consulting, strategy, business analysis, venture building, or similar analytical roles, including a minimum of 2 years in ophthalmology/ healthcare/ pharmaceuticals.
  • Strong analytical, problem-structuring, and problem-solving skills, with a keen eye for detail.
  • Basic financial modeling capability. 
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
  • Demonstrated entrepreneurial and collaborative mindset, with the ability to work independently, cross-functionally, and manage multiple tasks in parallel.
  • Ph.D. in a relevant scientific, medical, or business field.
  • Knowledge of industry best practices in Ophthalmology / Eyecare
  • Work from the Bern office whenever required, and willingness to travel internationally 3-4 times a year. 
  • Available to work during Central European Time (CET) business hours.

  • Opportunities for professional growth and development in an international setting.
  • A culture of collaboration and inclusion, which is fundamental to our ethos.
